---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for King Post
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem it would solve

Explain what limitation, inconvenience, or workflow problem this would address.

## Proposed behavior

Describe how you think the feature should work.

## Platforms involved

- [ ] YouTube
- [ ] TikTok
- [ ] Instagram
- [ ] Other Android apps
- [ ] King Post itself

## Local-first impact

Would this feature require an account, external server, platform API, analytics service, or additional Android permission?

## Alternatives considered

Describe any other approaches or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, or other details that may help explain the request.
